channel.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

  • 💼🔧 tailwindcss-vite-plugin - Vite plugin for Tailwind CSS, supports "Design in Devtools" mode and visualizes Tailwind CSS configuration.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Tools

  • 🔼🌍🔧 Tailwindhelper - Visualize Tailwind CSS classes and unit converter.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2022
item.description:
Plugins

  • 💼 Full Bleed Background and Bordersstars4 - Provides utilities for extended backgrounds and borders.

item.description:
Starters & Themes

  • 🚀 AstroWindstars225 - Production ready and SEO-friendly template to start a website using Astro and Tailwind CSS.

item.description:
Plugins

  • 💼 Hyphensstars9 - Adds hyphens utilities.

item.description:

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

  • 💼 twined-componentsstars6 - Extended component of a styled-components that prioritizes class names for use in Tailwind CSS.

    • Starters & Themes

item.description:

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 🧩 Material Tailwind - Easy to use components library for Tailwind CSS and Material Design.
  • 📁 Material Tailwind Kit React - Free Tailwind CSS and React UI kit.
  • 📁 Material Tailwind Dashboard React - Free Tailwind CSS and React admin template.
  • 📚 a17t - Atomic design toolkit built to extend Tailwind CSS.
  • 📚 tails-uistars181 - React UI library using Tailwind CSS.
  • 📚 tailsstars19 - Hand-crafted templates and components using Tailwind CSS.
  • 📁 Vue Notus - Open-source Tailwind CSS and Vue.js UI kit.
  • 📁 EasyTailwind - Freemium, easily customizable templates made with Tailwind CSS.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 27th - Oct 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • 💼 clbstars66 - clb (class list builder) is a utility function that builds a class list based on a Stitches like API.
  • 🌍 Flowrift - Beautifully designed Tailwind CSS UI blocks.

    • UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 🧩 Tailwind Typeaheadstars14 - Typeahead/Autocomplete component built with Vue.js and Tailwind CSS.
  • 📚 Flowbite - Open-source component library built with Tailwind CSS.
  • 🧩 Tailwind Datepickerstars98 - Adds a datepicker component built with Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript.
  • 📁 OhMySMTP Templatesstars142 - Set of Transactional HTML Email Templates, built with Maizzle

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Plugins

  • 🧬 Pseudo selectorsstars34 - Adds variants for the pseudo-classes and pseudo-elements that Tailwind CSS doesn't have by default.
  • 💼 Scrollbar Hidestars99 - Adds scrollbar-hide class for visual hide scrollbar.

    • UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 🧩 Mamba UI - Free Tailwind CSS components, sections and templates.
  • 🧩 Kometa UI Kit - Free multi-purpose UI kit, built with Tailwind CSS.

  • 🌍 Updrafts.app - Advanced online no-code drag and drop editor for Tailwind CSS.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021

    • Useful Links

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020

  • 🧩📁 Jakarta LTEstars130 - Admin template using Tailwind CSS.
  • 📁 Resumestars37 - Simple resume with Tailwind CSS.
  • 📁 Simple Lightstars1.6k - Free landing page template built with React & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 Palettolithic - Generates harmonius color palettes based on one color.
  • 💼 tailwind-classes-sorterstars18 - NPM library which provides a utility to sort Tailwind CSS classes.
  • 💼 prettier-plugin-tailwindstars428 - Prettier plugin that sorts class lists.

    • UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 🧩 Gust UI - Sleek Tailwind CSS components for web applications in React and HTML.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 🧩 lofi ui - Low-fidelity Tailwind CSS components.

    • Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 Hypercolor - Collection of pre-configured Tailwind CSS gradients with directional options.
  • 🌍💙 Play - Advanced online playground for Tailwind CSS.

    • Useful Links

  • 💙 Play - Advanced online playground for Tailwind CSS.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 💙📚 Headless UIstars17.1k - Completely unstyled, fully accessible UI components.

    • Tools

  • 🌍🔧 tail-animista - Configurable custom animation utilities generator for Tailwind CSS.
  • 🔼🌍 CSS to Tailwind CSS Converter - Converts CSS to Tailwind CSS by suggesting classes that best match.
  • 🌍 tailzilla.app - Online playground for Tailwind CSS.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins

  • 💼 Leading Trimstars50 - Adds utilities to trim text whitespace, using Capsizestars958.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Starters & Themes

  • 🚀 Eleventy Starterstars245 - Production-ready, SEO-friendly blog starter using Tailwind CSS.

    • Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 Grayscale Design - A Luminance-based color palette generator.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 TailwindInk - AI palette generator, trained with the Tailwind CSS palette.
  • 🌍 Typography Playground - Tool for trying different Google Fonts combinations with the Tailwind CSS Typography Plugin.

item.title: aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 Tailwind Color Explorer - Color explorer for Tailwind CSS.
  • 🎨🌍🔧 Tailwind Color Shades - Color shades generator for Tailwind CSS.
  • 🎨🌍🔧 Palette generator - Color palette generator that outputs Tailwind CSS configuration files.
  • 🎨🌍🔧 Tailwind Colors - Color configuration generator for Tailwind CSS.
  • 🌍🔧 GPT-3 Tailwind CSS code generator - OpenAI GPT-3 powered Tailwind CSS code generator.
  • 🌍🔧 Stitches - Template generator with Tailwind (online).
  • 🌍 tailwind.run - Tailwind CSS fiddle with built-time features (online).
  • 🔼🌍 Tailwind Automatic Prefix Applicator - Tailwind classes' prefixer tool.
  • 🔼 Tailwindostars923 - Bootstrap to Tailwind CSS converter.
  • 🔼 Tailupgradestars6 - Conversion tool for upgrading HTML files from Tailwind CSS v0.x to v1.0.
  • 🔼 Tailwind Shiftstars114 - Upgrade tool for upgrading from Tailwind CSS v0.7 to v1.0.
  • 🔼 RustyWindstars265 - CLI tool for sorting Tailwind CSS classes.
  • 🅰 react-native-tailwindcssstars543 - React Native typing system.
  • 🅰 typed-tailwindstars416 - TypeScript typings for Tailwind CSS.
  • 💼 Gatsby Pluginstars46 - Tailwind CSS integration for Gatsby.
  • 💼 Gridsome Pluginstars106 - Tailwind CSS integration for Gridsome.
  • 💼 Alfred Workflowstars113 - Fast Tailwind CSS documentation search application.
  • 💼 ng-tailwindcssstars203 - CLI tool for integrating Tailwind CSS into Angular-CLI projects.
  • 💼 vue-cli-plugin-tailwindstars204 - Vue CLI plugin that adds Tailwind CSS to a project.
  • 💼 @nuxtjs/tailwindcssstars1.1k - Tailwind CSS module for NuxtJS with PurgeCSS and modern CSS (preset env 1).
  • 💼 preact-cli-tailwindstars31 - Tailwind CSS integration for Preact.
  • 💼🔧 Zeplin Config & Class generator - Zeplin extension that generates Tailwind configurations.
  • 💼🔧 @tailwindcssinjs/macrostars354 - Babel macro that transforms Tailwind CSS classes into objects for CSS-in-JS libraries.
  • 💼🔧 twin.macrostars6.4k - Use Tailwind classes within any CSS-in-JS library.
  • 💼🔧 Tailwind Config Viewerstars1.5k - Local UI tool for visualizing your Tailwind CSS configuration file.
  • 💼🔧 Laravel Form Componentsstars623 - Blade form components using Tailwind CSS Custom Forms.
  • 🔧 re-tailwindstars118 - ReasonML utility that generates Tailwind classes.
  • 🔧 Protoship Codegen - Code generator that creates Tailwind CSS based HTML & CSS from Sketch designs.
  • 🚀 Maizzle - Framework for rapid email prototyping with Tailwind CSS.
  • 🌍 Tailwind Cheat Sheet - Tailwind CSS class names cheat sheet.
  • 🌍 Tailwind Cheat Sheet - Tailwind CSS class names in one single file.
  • 🌍 Tailwind Cheat Sheet - Tailwind CSS class names, variants and directives cheat sheet.

    • Useful Links

  • 💙 Website - Official Tailwind CSS website.
  • 💙 Repositorystars61.3k - Official Tailwind CSS repository.
  • 💙 Discussions - Official place to connect with other community members about Tailwind.
  • 💙 Tailwind UI - Component library made with Tailwind CSS.
  • 💙 Heroicons - Beautiful, hand-crafted SVG icons.
  • Tailwind Weekly - Weekly newsletter about all things Tailwind CSS.
  • Built With Tailwind - Community-driven collection of awesome websites built with Tailwind CSS.

    • IDE Extensions

  • 💙 IntelliSense for Code - IntelliSense extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • Styled Snippets for Code - Snippet extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • Headwind for Codestars1.2k - Class sorter extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • Shades for Codestars55 - Color palette generator extension for Visual Studio Code.
  • IntelliSense for Neovimstars334 - IntelliSense extension for Neovim.

    • Plugins

  • 💙🧩 Typographystars2.9k - Adds a prose class for beautiful typographic defaults.
  • 🎨🧬 Themingstars456 - Theming using CSS variables, with dark mode support.
  • 🎨🧬 Multi Themestars464 - Adds theme variants based on a single theme property.
  • 🎨🧬 Theme Swapperstars133 - Theming using CSS variables, with media queries support.
  • 💼 Custom Nativestars67 - Leverages Tailwind CSS's configuration to allow the creation of utilities.
  • 💼 Image Renderingstars73 - Adds image-rendering utilities.
  • 💼 Elevationstars134 - Adds Material UI elevation utilities.
  • 💼 Writing Modestars9 - Adds writing-mode utilities.
  • 💼 Border Gradientsstars174 - Adds border-image gradient utilities.
  • 💼 RFSstars41 - Adds RFS utilities.
  • 💼 List Resetstars1 - Adds back the list-reset class that was removed prior to Tailwind CSS 1.0.
  • 💼 Fluidstars108 - Adds fluid sizing utilities.
  • 💼 Typographystars250 - Adds typography utilities.
  • 💼 Triangle Afterstars19 - Adds CSS triangles utilities.
  • 💼 Scrimsstars37 - Adds scrims utilities.
  • 💼 Truncate Multilinestars90 - Adds utilities to truncate multi-line text elements.
  • 💼 CSS Logical Propertiesstars19 - Generate utilities for CSS Logical Properties.
  • 💼 Tooltip Arrows Afterstars38 - Adds CSS utilities for tooltip arrows with configurable border and background.
  • 💼 Bidirectionalstars273 - Adds utilities for creating multilingual bidirectional layouts.
  • 💼 Background SVGstars16 - Inject SVGs as background images with color variants.
  • 💼 Brand Colorsstars40 - Adds various brand colors for background, border and text.
  • 💼 Bootstrap Gridstars113 - Generates Bootstrap's style flexbox grid system.
  • 🧬 Touchstars41 - Adds touch variants.
  • 🧬 Localizedstars7 - Adds variants based on the HTML lang attribute, to use utilities only with certain languages.
  • 🧬 Padded Radiusstars13 - Adds variants for matching nested border radii.
  • 🧬 Fluidstars26 - Generates fl: variants.
  • 🧩 Debug Screensstars351 - Adds a component that shows the currently active screen (responsive breakpoint).
  • 🧩 Heropatternsstars146 - Adds Hero Patterns components.
  • 🧩 Responsive Embedstars83 - Adds a responsive-embed component.
  • 🧩 Bootstrap Tablesstars93 - Adds table components based on Bootstrap's tables.
  • 🧩 Cardstars34 - Adds card components.
  • 🧩 Skip linkstars13 - Adds a Skip to main content accessible component.
  • 🧩 Colors to CSS Variablesstars27 - Exports color configuration to CSS Custom Properties.
  • 🧩 CSS Variablesstars130 - Exports configuration to CSS Custom Properties.

    • UI Libraries, Components & Templates

  • 💙🧩 Tailwind UI - Component library made with Tailwind CSS.
  • 📚 VueTailwindstars1.9k - Vue.js UI library using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🧩 TailBlocks - 60+ different ready to use Tailwind CSS blocks.
  • 🧩 Tailwind Components - Community-driven Tailwind CSS component repository.
  • 🧩 Tailwind Toolbox - Templates, components and resources.
  • 🧩 Meraki UI Components - Beautiful Tailwind CSS components that support RTL languages.
  • 🧩📁 Tailwind Templates - Collection of templates and components.
  • 🧩📁 Treact - React UI templates and components built using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🧩 Kutty - Accessible and reusable components that are commonly used in web applications.
  • 🧩 Sail UI - Collection of basic UI components built on Tailwind CSS.
  • 🧩 jQuery Toggler - Switches using jQuery and Tailwind CSS.
  • 🧩 Tailwind Kit - Framework-agnostic, Vue.js, React and Angular components.
  • 📁 Windmill Dashboard - Multi theme, completely accessible dashboard template.
  • 📁 Tailwind Adminstars402 - Administration panel template with Tailwind CSS.
  • 📁 Landing Gradients - Landing page template using gradients (1.7+).

  • 🚀 Next.js Starterstars330 - Next.js boilerplate using Tailwind CSS.

  • 🚀 Netlify Lambda Starterstars8 - Netlify Lambda boilerplate using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🚀 Hugo Theme Starter with Tailwind CSSstars284 - Hugo theme starter using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🚀 Eleventy Web Starterstars314 - Starter kit using Eleventy, Tailwind CSS, Webpack and PostCSS.
  • 🚀 Nanoc Starterstars5 - Nanoc starter using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🚀 PostCSS and Browsersync Boilerplatestars29 - Boilerplate using CSS Nano.

  • 🚀 VuePress Tailwind CSS Starterstars13 - A VuePress starter using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🚀 Gatsby Serifstars29 - Gatsby's serif theme using Tailwind CSS.
  • 🚀 Seminyak Hugo Theme - Hugo theme using Tailwind CSS.
